inputs.label: Basic Dynamic Load Rating (C)
inputs.businessContext: Bearing dynamic load rating from manufacturer catalog

inputs.label: Equivalent Dynamic Load (P)
inputs.businessContext: Calculated equivalent radial/axial load on bearing

inputs.label: Life Exponent
inputs.businessContext: p=3 for ball bearings, p=10/3 (≈3.333) for roller bearings

inputs.label: Reliability Factor (a₁)
inputs.businessContext: 1 for 90% reliability; e.g., 0.62 for 95%, 0.53 for 96% per ISO 281

inputs.label: Rotational Speed
inputs.businessContext: Shaft speed; used to convert revolutions to hours
